name: Virgo
description: Maid Spirit Virgo. She initially had a contract with [Everlue](https://anilist.co/character/31151), but after he was arrested the contract broke. She handed her key to [Happy](https://anilist.co/character/5188) and told him to give it to [Lucy](https://anilist.co/character/5186). She is then called by Lucy to help them out of a situation. She explains that since she's a spirit, she takes the form that her master desires, so when she was bound to Everlue, she had a big woman form, according to he

name: Grea
description: A young girl who harbors the power of a dragon within herself wishes to be left alone. She's afraid of that power—a power that could wound others, as well as her own heart. But then a chance meeting with another girl shows her a new path. It's a path fraught with obstacles, but one Grea believes she can surpass with the help of her new friendship.

name: Kafuka Fuura
description: A somewhat strange and exceedingly optimistic student who always sees everything in the single most positive light possible: the polar opposite of Nozomu, who sees only the dark side of things and is constantly in despair. She often has bizarre, childishly optimistic explanations for grim situations, calling suicide by hanging "becoming taller" and the act of stalking "deep love." She enjoys giving whimsical nicknames to people (much to their annoyance), and has a strange obsession with aliens.

name: Rue Kuroha
description: Rue is a very difficult character to read. When the tale begins, she is in a relationship with Mytho more 'just because' than anything else, yet once Mytho is threatened from being taken away from her by gaining his heart, she finds that she does indeed care. As her feelings are revealed to herself, and Mytho is pulled farther and farther away from her into Princess Tutu's arms another side of her appears. ~!Her other side is Princess Kraehe who is the Raven's daughter. name: Suigetsu Houzuki
description: Suigetsu Hozuki is a former experimental subject of Orochimaru. Suigetsu once trained to be one of the Seven Swordsmen of the Mist, and as such has a number of traits consistent with other known members. In addition to having shark-like teeth, Suigetsu enjoys killing; Kisame Hoshigaki, one of the Seven Swordsmen, claims Suigetsu is a prodigy at the art of murder, as he has a habit of chopping off his victim's limbs before beheading them. name: Takamura
description: An old man carrying a katana. He is an assassin from The Order, a group consisting of the strongest members within the JAA.

Eina joined the Guild five years earlier at the age of 14 after she graduated from the school. Originally excited to work at the Guild, she quickly learned that it wasn't as fun as she thought it would be, eventually changing her personality into what it is now. name: Mami Yagihara
description: A girl that is within Touma's group of friends and grows upset with his newfound interest in hanging out with Futaba and Taichi instead of her. She is interested in Touma, but he does not reciprocate her affection.

description: __Grade:__ 1st Year __Position:__ "Deer-In-Training" of the Deer Club Meme Bashame is a new student at Hino Minami High School and the 4th official member of the Deer Club. Bashame joined the Deer Club because of her newfound idolization of [Noko Shikanoko](https://anilist.co/character/330136/Noko-Shikanoko), who had offered Bashame kindness and deer crackers: saving Bashame from starving on their first day of high school. Bashame hopes of learning to become a full-fledged deer during her stay i

name: Teru Momijiyama
description: __Nationality:__ Japanese __Height:__ 149 cm A shy girl with a burning passion. Akin to her hero name, Momijiyama is a timid hero who has trouble communicating with large groups of people. Despite this, she cares very much about others and wants to provide them with help if she can. (Source: SHY Wiki, edited)

name: Kirukiru Amou
description: A deranged psychopath carrying an unhealthy obsession with Nomura Fudou, seemingly stemming from a twisted sense of love where she demands his total submission before her and is willing to kill him otherwise. She earns the title of “Empress” after defeating two members of the Tenka Goken simultaneously. Amou specializes in Uechi-ryū, a traditional style of Okinawan Karate that emphasizes toughness of the body by being attacked and pained while practicing nukite based counter-attacks to a point o

name: Mifune
description: Mifune, known by the epithet "God of the Sword", is an infamous samurai and bodyguard who acts as a guardian to the little witch, Angela Leon. He is later blackmailed into the service of Arachnophobia by its head, Arachne Gorgon. He becomes involved in a somewhat one-sided rivalry with Black Star after the latter encounters him on a mission.

name: Natsuko Hirose
description: Natsuko works as an anime director and animator. She gets easily immersed and obsessive with her work, and thinks it is faster to do everything herself rather than rely on others. She also has trouble communicating with those around her.

name: Patausche Kivia
nativeName: パトーシェ・キヴィア
description: Captain of the 13th Holy Knights. She was originally supposed to make a pact with the Goddess [Teoritta](https://anilist.co/character/355726/Teoritta). She is a serious and righteous holy knight, but can also be strict and harsh in her words. She is willing to sacrifice her own life and the life of the hero for the Goddess.

name: Ryouma Nagare
description: Ryoma is the original leader of the Getter Team and the protagonist of many of the Getter Robo adaptions. In the original manga, he is portrayed as an extremely violent martial artist and the son of the "Dojo Destroyer" Ichigan Nagare. Ryoma is first discovered by Professor Saotome's assistants when he breaks into a karate tournament to take revenge on them for disgracing his father's name. Impressed, Saotome follows this up by sending 3 hitmen after him as a test of his ability. Ryoma kills all

He is named after Willard Wright and enforces Van Dine's Commandments. A young ace inquisitor once feared by witches for his cold and ruthless tactics, he gained the nicknames "Wright of the Twenty Wedges" and "Wizard-Hunting Wright".
